9820._nv_tagline: A mitochondrial-targeted tetrapeptide studied for its role in oxidative stress reduction and mitochondrial membrane stabilization.
9820._nv_specs_html:
Sequence: D-Arg-dimethylTyr-Lys-Phe-NH₂ (4 amino acids)
Molecular weight: ~640 Da
Appearance: White to off-white lyophilized powder
Solubility: Soluble in bacteriostatic water
Purity: ≥99% (HPLC)
Storage form: Lyophilized
9820._nv_shipping_html: Ships via cold-chain (insulated packaging with ice packs). Standard delivery: 3-5 business days within the continental US. Expedited shipping available at checkout.
9820._nv_storage_html: Store lyophilized vials at -20°C. Protect from light and moisture. After reconstitution with bacteriostatic water, store at 2-8°C and use within 28 days. Do not freeze reconstituted solution.
9820._nv_disclaimer: For research use only. Not for human or veterinary use. Not a drug, food, or cosmetic. Not for diagnostic or therapeutic use.

10129._nv_tagline: Sterile water preserved with 0.9% benzyl alcohol, for reconstituting lyophilized research compounds. 30 mL multi-dose vial.
10129._nv_spec_2: 30 mL multi-dose vial — clear sterile solution
10129._nv_specs_html:
CompositionSterile water + 0.9% benzyl alcohol
Volume30 mL — multi-dose
Preservative (CAS)Benzyl alcohol · 100-51-6
AppearanceClear, colourless liquid
pH range4.5 – 7.0
Endotoxins< 0.5 EU/ml
SterilityUSP method — Pass
VialPlastic, shatter-resistant, multi-dose
10129._nv_shipping_html: Ships from our Canadian and US fulfillment centers. Shelf-stable — no cold-chain handling required. Orders dispatch within [1–2] business days.
10129._nv_storage_html: Store at room temperature, away from direct light. Wipe the stopper with an alcohol swab before each withdrawal. After first puncture, use within 28 days.
